title: Scaleup Summit Turin: What's Next After Lean
summary: Eric delivers a fireside chat at OGR Torino in Turin, Italy as part of the Scaleup Summit, sharing reflections on the relationship between innovation, sustainable growth, and long-term vision. The event launches OGR Bridging Growth — a six-month program by Fondazione CRT and Mind the Bridge to accelerate 15 startups internationally, culminating in a CEO Retreat in Silicon Valley. Ries previews themes from Incorruptible, arguing that the systems designed to build companies often end up destroying their souls.
blockquote: What’s Next After Lean: Building Incorruptible Companies
